channel.title: Comments for page "Straight On Till Morning Hub"
channel.description: Posts in the discussion thread "Straight On Till Morning Hub"

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Just made a small change, very small. One of the skips wasn't properly linked

item.title: Using Good Concepts but Bad Choices
item.content:encoded:
…Why do we use Sci-fi shows? Why do we make such amazing ideas until we say "Screw the Universe!"? Simple, we know how to influence what we create of what we can have.

This hub is a great idea and Humanity evolving past their 'social' standards are a strong begging. But when you motivate new writers about sci-fi shows that stab the concept of fiction and use science as a flat-character, it makes me wanna get eaten by a horde of baby-snapping-turtles.

Here's a better idea for a Hub in the Future, "Don't allow Great Shows/Books/Games/Movie/Concepts/or even Characters to make works in which they put zero effort in! i.e. Voyager should not be on that Hub network! Roddenberry wanted to kill humanity by separating our characteristics into those alien races and those races want to acknowledge their Idiot Creators Presence!"
But good works, 6/10—will give +1.
(BTW Star Trek is the worst version of humanity ever! Even the 40k verse has common sense to evac civvies into near-hostile airspace. Star Trek; lets ignore the threats and let the aliens kill some heavy populate worlds until we get ticked off!)

item.title: Admin Post - Info - Open
item.content:encoded:
Noting that a recent edit linking to a now-deleted page has been reverted, as the author has moved their material offsite.

Editors, please obtain staff permission prior to editing collective hubs to include offsite links.

item.title: Regarding the recent page revision
item.content:encoded: Just an FYI, I went ahead and changed the audio player from Flash to HTML5, as Flash is rapidly losing support and already can't be viewed by many people, including Firefox and Mobile users. No content changes were made, and the article is otherwise unchanged.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: I like the page's theme. The powers that be should put all space-related skips under the FSF theme.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Every time I see this hub I think of the song Major Tom by David Bowie.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
I squealed with joy on the inside when I saw Subach-Innes and Lucifer.
Then I looked at the ship and weapon naming conventions. My smile couldn't get any wider.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: I had always wondered what happened to the people left behind from the switch. This is an awesome canon, can't wait to see more.

item.title: Woah!
item.content:encoded: Haven't even read a tale, and I can tell I'm gonna like this. Cool background!

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Hmm. So what about the Serpent's Hand? One would think they'd easily be able to go between the two solar systems.

item.title: Fire the canon!
item.content:encoded: As of "Dossier - FSF Delivery", we are officially a canon. Huzzah!

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Yep. I'm totally writing off-world colonies and space hydroponics for this one.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: I am SO making a space themed SCP in relation to this. THIS! I beautiful.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
I would love to make these designs in KSP just to see them, and well fly them (:
Sadly I'm not particularly good at designing ships that actually take off and fly…….

This hub looks really cool, and I hope it just keeps getting cooler! I'm really loving the stories so far.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: I have added an audio reading of the introduction, music used is from Youtube's Audio Library. Songs are Night Music by Kevin MacLeod and Space Coast by Topher Mohr and Alex Elena. Reading is done by me.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: I'll be honest, up until now, I've kind of had no idea what was going on in SOTM, but now I do, and this takes me back to my days of participating in video game-based collaborative writing groups. This could be really cool to write for!

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Must…crossover…with…Stealing Solidarity…canon…

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
a cold, dead world

Does that mean it's not Theta-C? Whatever the case, can't wait to see how this plays out.

Didn't read the second tab. -_- Well, that answers that.

item.title: Re: Cimmerian should have been the one to post this
item.content:encoded:
/me tips hat.

Great to be working with ya.

item.title: Cimmerian should have been the one to post this
item.content:encoded:
Welcome to Straight On Till Morning! It's not a full canon… yet. But it will be! Massive thanks to Cimmerian, obviously, who started this whole project.

Acknowledgement also to Twistedgears, Spikebrennan, Crayne, Echo and the good folks at Guntalk, SoundChaser, Prior… so many people.

Enjoy!

css and hella cool ships by me, von pincier
